CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Comment_AI_Router when NepaCommentEJDetector identifies EJ/tribal keywords in the comment body. Triggers NEPA_EJTribal_Router flow to route the comment to the EJ/Tribal Liaison queue and block AI classification. Per OMB M-24-10 and EO 12898, EJ/tribal comments bypass AI and require human review.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: EJ or tribal keywords detected. Comment bypassed AI classification and routed to EJ/Tribal Liaison queue. Human review required.
CustomField.label: EJ/Tribal Comment Flag
